def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # 1. Sort by (code, date) for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # 2. Compute (open - close)
    open_close = pl.col('open') - pl.col('close')

    # 3. delay((open - close), 1) — prior day's open-close difference
    delayed_oc = delay(open_close, periods=1)

    # 4. 200-day rolling correlation between delayed(open-close) and close
    corr_oc_close = rolling_corr(delayed_oc, pl.col('close'), window=200)

    # 5. Cross-sectional rank of the correlation
    rank_corr = rank(corr_oc_close).over('date')

    # 6. Cross-sectional rank of (open - close)
    rank_oc = rank(open_close).over('date')

    # 7. Sum the two ranks
    factor = rank_corr + rank_oc

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
